raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind in the last couple of weeks at work?","description":"Lets Tom set the agenda without introducing any manager judgment.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal scope","name":"What does Principal scope mean on this team to you?","description":"Surfaces his working model of the role and whether it matches the team’s expectations.","purpose":"topic","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact evidence","name":"Where do you think your impact has been most visible lately?","description":"Pushes for concrete evidence of leverage rather than steady delivery alone.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Question pattern","name":"In the last month, where have you held back from asking a question you had?","description":"Tests whether his low-question pattern is a habit, a choice, or a signal about context.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Assumption drift","name":"What assumptions from your previous team are you still carrying here?","description":"Checks for old operating models that may not fit this team’s expectations.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Judgment moments","name":"Where have you had to make a hard tradeoff call with another team recently?","description":"Looks for cross-team judgment and whether he is shaping outcomes or only executing within them.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Safety mode","name":"What makes it easier to stay in execution mode rather than push the decision earlier?","description":"Surfaces the forces that keep him from leaning into broader Principal behavior.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Early alignment","name":"What do you usually want to have settled before you bring others in?","description":"Probes how he approaches expectation alignment and whether he waits too long to surface uncertainty.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next stretch","name":"What would you want to change in how you work over the next month?","description":"Gets a concrete commitment on one behavior to shift without opening a new topic.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Commitment closer","name":"What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?","description":"Closes on a specific behavioral commitment tied to the feedback theme.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
